summary: The documentation build failed because a Python SyntaxError occurred while converting a documentation source file, causing the doc-conversion step to raise and the job to exit with code 1.
root_cause: A Python SyntaxError ('invalid syntax') was raised during the documentation conversion process (resolve_autodoc) for a docs source file (../transformers/docs...), causing the docs build to fail and the job to exit with code 1.

evidence.reason: Shows the type of error that occurred during the run.

evidence.quote: SyntaxError: There was an error when converting ../transformers/docs...
evidence.reason: Indicates the SyntaxError occurred while converting a documentation source file in ../transformers/docs...
Shows the failure happened during the resolve_autodoc step of the doc conversion process.

evidence.quote: raise type(e)(f"There was an error when converting {file} to the...
evidence.reason: Shows the code raised an error specifically when converting a file, tying the SyntaxError to the conversion step.
Confirms the job terminated with a non-zero exit code as a result of the error.

suggested_fix: Open the referenced documentation source file(s) under ../transformers/docs and fix the Python syntax error(s). Re-run the documentation build locally (including the resolve_autodoc step) to reproduce and verify the fix before pushing.
